title: Types of Museums
content: Museums are broadly categorized into art museums, history museums, science museums, and archaeological museums, each curating collections relevant to their theme for public education and preservation of heritage.

title: Visiting Hours and Tickets
content: Most museums operate from 10:00 AM to 5:30 PM and remain closed on a designated weekday, often Monday. Tickets can be purchased online in advance or at the counter, with discounted rates for students and senior citizens.

title: Guided Tours
content: Guided tours led by trained docents are available at major museums, offering in-depth explanations of exhibits, artifacts, and historical context. Audio guides in multiple languages are also commonly available.

title: Conservation Practices
content: Museums employ climate-controlled storage, UV-filtered lighting, and specialized handling protocols to preserve artifacts, manuscripts, and artworks from environmental degradation over time.

title: Digital and Virtual Museums
content: Many museums now offer virtual tours and digitized collections accessible online, allowing global audiences to explore exhibits remotely through high-resolution imagery and 3D reconstructions.
